formDescription: Paste the password and encoded Argon2 PHC hash string. Verification runs locally in this browser.
passwordDescription: The plain password is never sent anywhere; it is only used for this local verification.
hashDescription: Use the full encoded hash string, including the Argon2 variant, parameters, salt, and digest.
secretPlaceholder: Enter the same secret used when hashing
secretDescription: Only fill this if the original hash was generated with an Argon2 secret value.
resultDescription: The result reflects the last submitted password and Argon2 hash.
idleDescription: Enter a password and encoded Argon2 hash, then run verification.
verifyingDescription: Argon2 can be intentionally memory-hard, so verification may take a moment.
verifiedDescription: The supplied password verifies against this Argon2 hash.
mismatchDescription: The hash is valid, but the supplied password did not verify.
invalidDescription: Check that the value is a complete encoded Argon2 hash string and that any secret matches the one used to create it.
